title: Find a passport or travel document form - Canada.ca
content:
## Find a passport or travel document form

## Passport and travel document service fees have increased
As of March 31, 2026 , most fees for passports and travel document services have increased. Learn how these changes may affect your application .
Only use passport forms from this website (Canada.ca). Forms on other sites may not be official or up to date.
Always download a new form each time you submit an application. We may reject your application if you don’t use the latest official form.

## Get the forms you need for your application
Answer the questions below. We’ll then give you all the forms you need for your application.
- In Canada or the US Contact us online (opens in a new tab) or call 1-800-567-6868 (TTY: 1-866-255-7655). Tell us whether you need a large print form or braille instructions, and your mailing address. We’ll mail you the forms.
- Tell us whether you need a large print form or braille instructions, and your mailing address. We’ll mail you the forms.
- Outside Canada and the US: contact the closest Canadian government office abroad .

## Forms to renew a passport in Canada
Avoid delays or submitting the wrong forms. Before you apply
- check  if you’re eligible
- find  out how to submit your application
If you’re having problems with our forms, learn how to open the forms on your computer .

### Download the main form
Adult passport renewal application [PPTC 054] (PDF, 1.64 MB)
- Credit card payment authorization (inside Canada and the US) [PPTC 084] (PDF, 91 KB)
- Additional information – address and occupation [PPTC 056] (PDF, 2.5 MB)
- Additional information – documents to support identity and references [PPTC 057] (PDF, 1.3 MB)
- Declaration concerning a lost, stolen, inaccessible, damaged or found Canadian travel document [PPTC 203] (PDF, 1.3 MB)
- Declaration – additional information to apply for travel document services for an adult who requires authorized third party assistance [PPTC 662] (PDF, 1.3 MB)
- Request – sex or gender identifier – adult 16 years or older [PPTC 643] (PDF, 1.1 MB)

### Supporting forms for your application
- Credit card payment authorization (outside Canada and the US) [GAC-AMC 2153] (PDF, 98 KB)
- use your computer The forms may not open on mobile devices (iPads, tablets, mobile phones).
- The forms may not open on mobile devices (iPads, tablets, mobile phones).
- save the file on your computer in a place you can remember
- use Adobe Reader 10 or higher to open the file on your computer If you don’t have it, download Adobe Reader 10 for free. Adobe has help for solving common issues with Reader .
- If you don’t have it, download Adobe Reader 10 for free.
- Adobe has help for solving common issues with Reader .
For more help, see our step-by-step instructions on downloading and opening PDFs .
If you still have trouble opening the forms, contact us online or call us at 1-800-567-6868 . If you’re outside Canada or the United States, contact the closest Canadian government office abroad .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
